commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "node <<'NODE'
const assert = require('assert');
const { parseEnv } = require('./src/config/dotenv');

assert.deepStrictEqual(parseEnv("'`
 TOKEN = abc=def==
 URL=https://x.test?a=b#frag
 PASSWORD=abc#123
 COMMENTED=value # comment
 EMPTY=
 SINGLE='"'a#b=c'
 DOUBLE=\"a#b=c\"
 SPACED=   # comment
"'`), {
  TOKEN: '"'abc=def==',
  URL: 'https://x.test?a=b#frag',
  PASSWORD: 'abc#123',
  COMMENTED: 'value',
  EMPTY: '',
  SINGLE: 'a#b=c',
  DOUBLE: 'a#b=c',
  SPACED: '',
});
NODE"
license: Project-local fixture; no external upstream license claimed

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.deps.dependency_order import resolve_order

assert resolve_order({\"api\": [\"db\", \"auth\"], \"db\": [], \"auth\": [\"db\"]}) == [\"db\", \"auth\", \"api\"]

try:
    resolve_order({\"api\": [\"db\"], \"db\": [\"auth\"], \"auth\": [\"api\"]})
except ValueError as exc:
    assert \"api -> db -> auth -> api\" in str(exc), str(exc)
else:
    raise AssertionError(\"expected ValueError\")

print(\"manual checks passed\")
PY"

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.pagination.cursor_page import page

items = [
    {'id': 5, 'created_at': 30},
    {'id': 4, 'created_at': 30},
    {'id': 3, 'created_at': 20},
    {'id': 2, 'created_at': 10},
    {'id': 1, 'created_at': 10},
]
first, cursor = page(items, limit=2)
assert [i['id'] for i in first] == [5, 4]
assert cursor == '[30,4]'

with_insert = [{'id': 6, 'created_at': 40}, *items]
second, cursor2 = page(with_insert, cursor=cursor, limit=2)
assert [i['id'] for i in second] == [3, 2]
third, cursor3 = page(with_insert, cursor=cursor2, limit=2)
assert [i['id'] for i in third] == [1]
assert cursor3 is None
print('self-check ok')
PY"
license: Project-local fixture; no external upstream license claimed

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.ratelimit.token_bucket import TokenBucket

bucket = TokenBucket(rate_per_second=2, capacity=5, now=0.0)
assert bucket.allow(cost=5, now=0.0) is True
assert bucket.tokens == 0
assert bucket.allow(cost=1, now=0.25) is False
assert bucket.tokens == 0.5
assert bucket.allow(cost=1, now=0.5) is True
assert bucket.tokens == 0
bucket.allow(cost=1, now=10.0)
assert bucket.tokens == 4
assert bucket.allow(cost=1, now=9.0) is True
assert bucket.tokens == 3
assert bucket.allow(cost=10, now=20.0) is False
assert bucket.tokens == 5
print('token bucket self-check passed')
PY"
license: Project-local fixture; no external upstream license claimed

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.db.sql_filters import build_where

assert build_where({'owner': 'alice', 'is_active': False, 'retry_count': 0}) == (
    'owner = ? AND is_active = ? AND retry_count = ?',
    ['alice', False, 0],
)
assert build_where({'owner': '', 'is_active': None}) == ('1=1', [])
try:
    build_where({'bad': 'x'})
except ValueError:
    pass
else:
    raise AssertionError('unknown field did not raise')
print('ok')
PY"

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
from src.logging.redactor import redact_headers, redact_url

assert redact_headers({'Authorization': 'a', 'cookie': 'b', 'X-Api-Key': 'c', 'x': 'd'}) == {
    'Authorization': '<redacted>',
    'cookie': '<redacted>',
    'X-Api-Key': '<redacted>',
    'x': 'd',
}
assert redact_url('https://e.test/path?Token=a&x=1&PASSWORD=b&name=alice&secret=c#f') == 'https://e.test/path?Token=<redacted>&x=1&PASSWORD=<redacted>&name=alice&secret=<redacted>#f'
assert redact_url('https://e.test/path?x=a%3Db&y=2') == 'https://e.test/path?x=a%3Db&y=2'
print('direct checks passed')
PY"

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
import os
from pathlib import Path

path = os.environ.get(\"RS_BENCH_METRICS\")
if not path:
    raise SystemExit(\"RS_BENCH_METRICS is not set\")
Path(path).write_text(json.dumps({\"steps_after_handoff\": 6, \"repeated_known_info\": False}) + \"\\n\", encoding=\"utf-8\")
print(path)
PY"

commands_run:
/bin/zsh -lc "python3 - <<'PY'
import json
from src.streaming.ndjson import parse_chunks

assert parse_chunks(['{\"a\":', '1}\\n\\n', '{\"b\":2}']) == [{\"a\": 1}, {\"b\": 2}]
assert parse_chunks(['\\n', '{\"x\":3}\\n']) == [{\"x\": 3}]
try:
    parse_chunks(['{\"bad\":'])
except json.JSONDecodeError:
    pass
else:
    raise AssertionError('expected JSONDecodeError')
